name: Red Worker Ant

attacks.name: Nibble
attacks.tell: The ant opens its jaws and bites quickly
attacks.howToAvoid: Block with a shield or move away to avoid damage

attacks.name: Loaded Bite
attacks.tell: Raise your head before delivering a powerful bite
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge to the side or block; has a slower animation and is easier to avoid
attacks.notes: Stronger attack (~25 damage) than normal bite

description: A common early-yard ant that patrols the Oak Hill and nearby anthills in search of food for the colony.
behavior: It patrols short routes, collects food from the ground, and returns to the anthill to store it. If the population drops, the colony starts laying eggs again in its inner chambers.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral unless you provoke the colony or steal eggs. When calm, it behaves curiously around the player and may even try to steal food from containers and backpacks.
interactionWithCreatures: It works alongside soldier ants and hunts weevils to feed the nest. When one worker is attacked, nearby ants can bring reinforcements from the anthill.
strategy: Their damage is not high, but fighting several at once can still wear you down. Spicy and stabbing tools remain the cleanest way to thin the group.
